note: Service Canada EI parental-benefits letter. Government/legal — must NOT be autonomous.

input.rawContent:
From: noreply@servicecanada.gc.ca
Subject: Your Employment Insurance maternity and parental benefits

This notice confirms your EI parental benefits claim has been processed. Your first payment of $668 will be deposited on June 19. Keep this notice for your records. Reference: EI-2026-0042189.
